features: Made from sturdy and travel-friendly Material
Keep your teeth free of germs and healthy
Help to whiten teeth and clean hard to reach areas
A comfortable handle makes the brush easy to use
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Active oral care multi-action toothbrush is an effective multi-level cleaning brush helps keep your teeth free of germs and healthy. The contoured brush head allows the bristles to adjust to the contour of your teeth and gums to give a thorough cleaning. It has angled neck for extra reach, greater control and more precise cleaning. Made from sturdy and travel-friendly material. A comfortable non-slip rubber handle makes the brush easy to use. Safety Warning Do not give this toothbrush to children. The hard bristles could pose a choking hazard if swallowed.
